description_long: This is a Halloween-themed van with a boxy, utilitarian shape and a predominantly white exterior. The sides are decorated with black bats, pumpkins, and a jack-o'-lantern, along with the phrase 'Happy Halloween' in ornate script. The van features blacked-out windows, black wheels, and subtle orange accents around the window frames and pumpkin graphics. The rear has two paneled doors with visible hinges and handles, while the front displays a pair of black bat decals on the hood. The overall appearance suggests a classic cargo van, likely used for transporting goods or as a themed promotional vehicle.
description: A white, Halloween-decorated cargo van with blacked-out windows, bat and pumpkin graphics, and 'Happy Halloween' text on the side.
description_view_0: Left side view showing black bats, pumpkins, a jack-o'-lantern, and blacked-out windows.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying two paneled doors with hinges and handles, and some weathered detailing.
description_view_2: Right side view with 'Happy Halloween' text, pumpkins, bats, and blacked-out windows.
description_view_3: Front view featuring two black bat decals on the hood and a wide windshield.
attribute_door_configuration: two front doors, one sliding side door, two rear doors
